svg.text: Three agents · Three frameworks · One verifiable session

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does PiQrypt integrate with LangChain agents?')
sendPrompt('How does PiQrypt integrate with AutoGen agents?')

g.text: Neither agent can deny the interaction
Cross-framework · Offline · No shared server · Legally admissible
LangChain + AutoGen + Custom Python — same session, independent keys

svg.text: LangSmith · CrewAI · AutoGen · LangGraph — none offer cross-agent co-signed identity
